{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Cynaran law code
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Cynaran law code]] states that no noble may take actions for personal gain at the risk of national stability.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Literature]]
